MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert; Clerk: SRavinantapricha; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Thanh Hui is present.
Attorney, Jonathan Black, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Raquel Vegas, is present.
Attorney, Robert Chang, representing the defendant through limited scope.
Staff Attorney Peng Ly, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 603, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
